pageDescription: Calculate your ideal breast implant size based on body measurements, current cup size, and aesthetic goals for natural, proportional results

messages.enterInformation: Enter your measurements to see personalized recommendations
messages.disclaimer: This calculator provides estimates only. Always consult with a board-certified plastic surgeon for personalized recommendations.

errors.chestWidth: Please enter a valid chest width
errors.currentCupSize: Please select your current cup size
errors.desiredCupSize: Please select your desired cup size
errors.desiredTooSmall: Desired cup size must be larger than current cup size

guidance.largeIncrease: You're looking for a significant size increase. Consider gradual augmentation or consult about tissue expansion.
guidance.tightSkin: With tight skin elasticity, achieving larger sizes may require staged procedures for optimal results.
guidance.activeLifestyle: For an active lifestyle, consider how larger implants may affect physical activities and sports.
guidance.petiteFrame: Your petite frame may be better suited for moderate-sized implants for natural proportions.
guidance.highProfile: High-profile implants provide more forward projection with less width, ideal for narrower chest walls.

tooltips.height: Your total body height affects overall proportions
tooltips.weight: Body weight helps determine frame size and tissue characteristics
tooltips.chestWidth: The width across your chest/rib cage determines implant base width
tooltips.currentCupSize: Your starting bra cup size (varies by brand)
tooltips.desiredCupSize: The cup size you wish to achieve after surgery
tooltips.skinElasticity: How stretchy your skin is affects implant accommodation
tooltips.lifestyle: Your activity level influences implant size recommendations
tooltips.implantProfile: How much the implant projects forward from the chest
tooltips.implantShape: The overall shape of the implant (round vs anatomical)
